title: xanthophyllum eglandulosum
intro: Xanthophyllum eglandulosum, also known as the Eglandulosum xanthophyllum, is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. Xanthophyllum eglandulosum has been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as to alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and promoting overall well-being.
